data.description: Libro's revenue spikes by 30% in H1 2025.

data.title: Mogo Inc. reports positive net income, strong growth in wealth and payments in Q2 2025. CEO: "Financial growth due to Intelligent Investing platform."
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Mogo Inc. (NASDAQ: MOGO) (TSX: MOGO) disclosed their financial and operational performance for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. The digital wealth and payments company highlighted advancements made to their Intelligent Investing wealth platform during this period. David Feller, the Founder & CEO, commented on the outcomes stating, “We continued to strengthen and expand our Intelligent Investing wealth platform during the second quarter.” The company presented growth figures indicative of changing investor preferences towards long-term strategies.

data.title: Invesque Inc. reports Q2 2025 results with significant progress - closed on several sales transactions with US$114.1 million in total.
data.description: Invesque Inc. reported its results for the Q2 and the six months ended June 30, 2025, highlighting multiple asset dispositions. They closed several sales transactions, including selling a seniors housing asset in New York for US$25.1 million in April, 20 seniors housing assets in Virginia and Pennsylvania and their stake in Commonwealth Senior Living, LLC in June, and memory care assets in multiple states for US$83.2 million in July. They also transitioned management of some assets to new companies. The company's revenue for the Q2 was $29,548, net income was $15,947, FFO was (1,491), and AFFO was $418. The balance sheet showed total assets of $325,569 and debt of $180,498 as of June 30, 2025. Invesque focuses on health care real estate investments in North America with a portfolio of income-generating seniors housing communities. They aim to decrease leverage and streamline their capital stack in the upcoming period.

data.title: SciSparc and Clearmind collaboration yields PCT patent application targeting obesity and high blood sugar. (Total characters: 89)
data.description: Tel Aviv-based pharmaceutical company SciSparc Ltd. (Nasdaq: SPRC) revealed its successful partnership with Clearmind Medicine Inc. (Nasdaq: CMND) today, resulting in the publication of an international patent application under the Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT). The collaboration, aimed at developing therapies for central nervous system disorders and rare diseases, marks a significant milestone for SciSparc. The patent application signifies a major step in the companies' joint efforts, reinforcing their commitment to innovative pharmaceutical solutions.

data.title: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. reported second quarter 2025 GAAP net income of $3.4 million and Distributable Earnings of $4.1 million.
data.description: During the second quarter of 2025, the company reported a GAAP net income of $3.4 million, equivalent to $0.25 per basic weighted average common share. Additionally, Distributable Earnings for the same period amounted to $4.1 million, translating to $0.31 per basic weighted average common share.

data.title: New Bern selects Hansen MDM for smart meter data management for electricity and water to enhance city experiences.
data.description: Hansen MDM has been chosen through a competitive selection process to provide the City of New Bern with advanced analysis of smart meter data management for their electricity and water services. This initiative aims to enhance operational efficiency and service delivery by leveraging the capabilities of Hansen MDM technology. The decision was made after a thorough evaluation, with the city expecting significant improvements in data processing and insights due to this partnership. City officials are optimistic that this collaboration will result in better management of energy and water resources, ultimately benefiting the residents of New Bern.

data.title: APQX partners with Swiss rider Morgane Dassio to enhance show jumping with machine learning.
data.description: A Swiss show jumping athlete has recently joined forces with a leading Scientific Machine Learning (SCiML) company to advance the boundaries of their sport. The partnership between APQX, an up-and-coming performance technology innovator, and the Swiss international rider aims to elevate show jumping to new levels. The collaboration, formed in Dallas on August 7, 2025, signifies a significant step forward in the industry. By combining their expertise, these two entities are set to revolutionize show jumping with cutting-edge technologies.

data.title: Vital Farms (Nasdaq: VITL) reports Q2 2025 financial results: Net Revenue up 25.4% to $184.8M, Gross Margin 38.9%, Net Income $16.6M.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Vital Farms, a company listed on Nasdaq as VITL and known for their ethically produced foods, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending June 29, 2025. During this period, the company experienced significant growth compared to the same quarter in the previous year, with a 25.4% increase in Net Revenue reaching $184.8 million, up from $147.4 million. The Gross Margin for the quarter was reported at 38.9%, slightly down from 39.1% in the prior year. Vital Farms also saw a Net Income of $16.6 million during the quarter.

data.title: XRP whales dump $1.9B, analyst warns of 30% price dip risk.Whale wallets must receive over 5M tokens daily for XRP to strengthen.
data.description: An analyst cautioning about the structural weakness of XRP suggested that daily inflows of over 5 million tokens into whale wallets are needed for potential improvement in its performance.
